nasb.text: Everyone who is numbered, from twenty years old and over, shall give the contribution to the Lord.

esv.text: Everyone who is numbered in the census, from twenty years old and upward, shall give the Lord’s offering.

cnv.text: 凡是屬於那些被數點的人，自二十歲以上的，要把禮物獻給耶和華。

ccb.text: 凡被统计的，年龄在二十岁以上的男子都要献此礼物给耶和华。
